_comment: Quaternius Universal Animation Library map. Their rig is already a stripped humanoid close to ours; bone names follow the standard Mixamo-ish pattern but without the prefix. Names below match UAL1 / UAL2 — verify against the actual GLB you download (use scripts/inspect_glb.ts to dump node names). Quaternius is A-pose: arms hang ~30° outward, so upper_arm restDeltas pull them back toward our T-pose.
